name: Agonizing Blast
prerequisite: Warlock level 2+, a Warlock cantrip that deals damage
description:
Choose one of your known Warlock cantrips that deals damage. You can add your Charisma modifier to that spell's damage rolls.

**Repeatable.** You can gain this invocation more than once. Each time you do so, choose a different eligible cantrip.

properties.text: Add Charisma modifier to damage rolls of the chosen Warlock damage cantrip.

name: Ambush
description: When you make a Dexterity (Stealth) check or an Initiative roll, you can expend one Superiority Die and add the die to the roll, unless you have the {condition:Incapacitated} condition.

properties.text: Expend one Superiority Die to add it to a Dexterity (Stealth) check or Initiative roll (can't be used while Incapacitated).

name: Arcane Propulsion Armor
prerequisite: Artificer level 14, a suit of armor (requires attunement)
description:
The wearer of this armor gains these benefits:

- The wearer's walking speed increases by 5 feet.
- The armor includes gauntlets, each of which is a magic melee weapon that can be wielded only when the hand is holding nothing. The wearer is proficient with the gauntlets, and each one deals 1d8 force damage on a hit and has the thrown property, with a normal range of 20 feet and a long range of 60 feet. When thrown, the gauntlet detaches and flies at the attack's target, then immediately returns to the wearer and reattaches.
- The armor can't be removed against the wearer's will.
- If the wearer is missing any limbs, the armor replaces those limbs — hands, arms, feet, legs, or similar appendages. The replacements function identically to the body parts they replace.

properties.text: Includes magic gauntlets (1d8 force, thrown 20/60 ft, proficient, returns after thrown). Armor can't be removed against wearer's will. Replaces missing limbs.

name: Armor of Magical Strength
description:
This armor has 6 charges. The wearer can expend the armor's charges in the following ways:

- When the wearer makes a Strength check or a Strength saving throw, it can expend 1 charge to add a bonus to the roll equal to its Intelligence modifier.
- If the creature would be knocked {condition:Prone}, it can use its reaction to expend 1 charge to avoid being knocked prone.

The armor regains 1d6 expended charges daily at dawn.

properties.text: 6 charges (regain 1d6 at dawn). Expend 1 charge to add Intelligence modifier to a Strength check or Strength saving throw, or expend 1 charge as a reaction to avoid being knocked Prone.

name: Armor of Shadows
description: You can cast {spell:Mage Armor} on yourself without expending a spell slot.

name: Ascendant Step
description: You can cast {spell:Levitate} on yourself without expending a spell slot.

name: Aspect of the Moon
description: You no longer need to sleep and can't be forced to sleep by any means. To gain the benefits of a long rest, you can spend all 8 hours doing light activity, such as reading your Book of Shadows and keeping watch.

properties.text: You no longer need to sleep and can't be forced to sleep by any means. You can take a long rest with 8 hours of light activity.

name: Bait and Switch
description:
When you're within 5 feet of a creature on your turn, you can expend one Superiority Die and switch places with that creature, provided you spend at least 5 feet of movement and the creature is willing and doesn't have the {condition:Incapacitated} condition. This movement doesn't provoke {action:Opportunity Attack|Opportunity Attacks}.

Roll the Superiority Die. Until the start of your next turn, you or the other creature (your choice) gains a bonus to AC equal to the number rolled.

properties.text: Expend one Superiority Die to swap places with a willing, non-Incapacitated creature within 5 ft (costs 5 ft of movement, doesn't provoke opportunity attacks), then grant yourself or that creature a bonus to AC equal to the die roll until the start of your next turn.

name: Banishing Arrow
description:
You use abjuration magic to try to temporarily banish your target to a harmless location in the Feywild. The creature hit by the arrow must also succeed on a Charisma saving throw or be banished. While banished in this way, the target's speed is 0, and it is {condition:Incapacitated}. At the end of its next turn, the target reappears in the space it vacated or in the nearest unoccupied space if that space is occupied.

After you reach 18th level in this class, a target also takes 2d6 force damage when the arrow hits it.

properties.text: Expend one Arcane Shot use. On hit, target makes a Charisma saving throw or is banished (speed 0, Incapacitated) until the end of its next turn, then reappears. At Arcane Archer level 18+, also deals 2d6 force damage on hit.

name: Beguiling Arrow
description:
Your enchantment magic causes this arrow to temporarily beguile its target. The creature hit by the arrow takes an extra 2d6 psychic damage, and choose one of your allies within 30 feet of the target. The target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw, or it is {condition:Charmed} by the chosen ally until the start of your next turn. This effect ends early if the chosen ally attacks the charmed target, deals damage to it, or forces it to make a saving throw.

The psychic damage increases to 4d6 when you reach 18th level in this class.

properties.text: Expend one Arcane Shot use. On hit, deals extra 2d6 psychic damage (4d6 at level 18) and target makes a Wisdom saving throw or is Charmed by a chosen ally within 30 ft until the start of your next turn (ends early if the ally harms the target).

name: Blessed Warrior
description: You learn two cantrips of your choice from the cleric spell list. They count as paladin spells for you, and Charisma is your spellcasting ability for them. Whenever you gain a level in this class, you can replace one of these cantrips with another cantrip from the cleric spell list.

name: Blind Fighting
description: You have {rule:Blindsight|blindsight} with a range of 10 feet. Within that range, you can effectively see anything that isn't behind total cover, even if you're {condition:Blinded} or in darkness. Moreover, you can see an {condition:Invisible} creature within that range, unless the creature successfully hides from you.

name: Bond of the Talisman
prerequisite: Warlock level 12+, Pact of the Talisman
description: While someone else is wearing your talisman, you can use your action to teleport to the unoccupied space closest to them, provided the two of you are on the same plane of existence. The wearer of your talisman can do the same thing, using their action to teleport to you. The teleportation can be used a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus, and all expended uses are restored when you finish a long rest.

properties.text: As an action, teleport to the closest unoccupied space near your talisman's wearer (same plane). Wearer can do the same. Uses equal to proficiency bonus, restored on long rest.

name: Boots of the Winding Path
prerequisite: Artificer level 6, a pair of boots (requires attunement)
description: While wearing these boots, a creature can teleport up to 15 feet as a bonus action to an unoccupied space the creature can see. The creature must have occupied that space at some point during the current turn.

properties.text: Bonus action: teleport up to 15 ft to an unoccupied space you can see, provided you occupied that space at some point during the current turn.

name: Brace
description: When a creature you can see moves into the reach you have with the melee weapon you're wielding, you can use your reaction to expend one Superiority Die and make one attack against the creature, using that weapon. If the attack hits, add the Superiority Die to the weapon's damage roll.

properties.text: Reaction: when a creature moves into your melee weapon reach, expend one Superiority Die to make one melee attack against it. On a hit, add the Superiority Die to the damage roll.

name: Bursting Arrow
description:
You imbue your arrow with force energy drawn from the school of evocation. The energy detonates after your attack. Immediately after the arrow hits the creature, the target and all other creatures within 10 feet of it take 2d6 force damage each.

The force damage increases to 4d6 when you reach 18th level in this class.

properties.text: Expend one Arcane Shot use. On hit, the target and all other creatures within 10 ft of it take 2d6 force damage (4d6 at level 18).

name: Careful Spell
description: When you cast a spell that forces other creatures to make a saving throw, you can protect some of those creatures from the spell's full force. To do so, spend 1 Sorcery Point and choose a number of those creatures up to your Charisma modifier (minimum of one creature). A chosen creature automatically succeeds on its saving throw against the spell, and it takes no damage if it would normally take half damage on a successful save.

properties.text: Spend 1 Sorcery Point when casting a spell with a saving throw: choose up to Charisma modifier creatures (min 1) to automatically succeed on the save and take no damage on a successful half-damage save.

name: Cloak of Flies
description:
As a bonus action, you can surround yourself with a magical aura that looks like buzzing flies. The aura extends 5 feet from you in every direction, but not through total cover. It lasts until you're {condition:Incapacitated} or you dismiss it as a bonus action.

The aura grants you advantage on Charisma (Intimidation) checks but disadvantage on all other Charisma checks. Any other creature that starts its turn in the aura takes poison damage equal to your Charisma modifier (minimum of 0 damage).

Once you use this invocation, you can't use it again until you finish a short or long rest.

properties.text: As a bonus action, create a 5-foot fly aura: advantage on Intimidation checks, disadvantage on other Charisma checks. Creatures starting their turn in the aura take poison damage equal to your Charisma modifier (min 0). Lasts until Incapacitated or dismissed as a bonus action.

name: Cloud Rune
description:
This rune emulates the deceptive magic used by some cloud giants. While wearing or carrying an object inscribed with this rune, you have {rule:Advantage|advantage} on Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) checks and Charisma (Deception) checks.

In addition, when you or a creature you can see within 30 feet of you is hit by an attack roll, you can use your reaction to invoke the rune and choose a different creature within 30 feet of you, other than the attacker. The chosen creature becomes the target of the attack, using the same roll. This magic can transfer the attack's effects regardless of the attack's range. Once you invoke this rune, you can't do so again until you finish a short or long rest.

properties.text: Reaction (recharge short or long rest): when you or a creature within 30 ft is hit by an attack roll, redirect the attack to a different creature of your choice within 30 ft (other than the attacker), using the same roll.

name: Commander's Strike
description: When you take the {action:Attack} action on your turn, you can replace one of your attacks to direct one of your companions to strike. When you do so, choose a willing creature who can see or hear you and expend one Superiority Die. That creature can immediately use its Reaction to make one attack with a weapon or an Unarmed Strike, adding the Superiority Die to the attack's damage roll on a hit.

properties.text: Expend one Superiority Die; replace one attack from your Attack action to allow a willing ally who can see or hear you to use their Reaction to make one weapon attack or Unarmed Strike, adding the Superiority Die to damage on a hit.

name: Commanding Presence
description: When you make a Charisma (Intimidation, Performance, or Persuasion) check, you can expend one Superiority Die and add that die to the roll.

properties.text: Expend one Superiority Die to add it to a Charisma (Intimidation), Charisma (Performance), or Charisma (Persuasion) check.

name: Devil's Sight
description: You can see normally in dim light and darkness—both magical and nonmagical—within 120 feet of yourself.

properties.text: Darkvision functions normally in magical darkness as well as nonmagical darkness.

name: Devouring Blade
description: The Extra Attack of your {optfeature:Thirsting Blade} invocation confers two extra attacks rather than one.

properties.text: Thirsting Blade's Extra Attack now grants two extra attacks with your pact weapon instead of one (three total attacks when you take the Attack action).

name: Disarming Attack
description: When you hit a creature with an attack roll, you can expend one Superiority Die to attempt to disarm the target. Add the Superiority Die roll to the attack's damage roll. The target must succeed on a Strength saving throw or drop one object of your choice that it's holding, with the object landing in its space.

properties.text: On hit: expend one Superiority Die, add it to damage. The target makes a Strength saving throw or drops one held object of your choice into its space.

name: Distant Spell
description: When you cast a spell that has a range of at least 5 feet, you can spend 1 Sorcery Point to double the spell's range. Or when you cast a spell that has a range of Touch, you can spend 1 Sorcery Point to make the spell's range 30 feet.

properties.text: Spend 1 Sorcery Point to double a spell's range (min 5 ft range), or change a Touch-range spell's range to 30 feet.

name: Distracting Strike
description: When you hit a creature with an attack roll, you can expend one Superiority Die to distract the target. Add the Superiority Die roll to the attack's damage roll. The next attack roll against the target by an attacker other than you has {rule:Advantage|advantage} if the attack is made before the start of your next turn.

properties.text: On hit: expend one Superiority Die, add it to damage. The next attack roll against the target by another attacker before the start of your next turn has advantage.

name: Druidic Warrior
description: You learn two cantrips of your choice from the druid spell list. They count as ranger spells for you, and Wisdom is your spellcasting ability for them. Whenever you gain a level in this class, you can replace one of these cantrips with another cantrip from the druid spell list.

name: Eldritch Mind
description: You have {rule:Advantage} on Constitution saving throws that you make to maintain {status:Concentration}.

name: Eldritch Smite
prerequisite: Warlock level 5+, Pact of the Blade
description: Once per turn when you hit a creature with your pact weapon, you can expend a Pact Magic spell slot to deal an extra 1d8 Force damage to the target, plus another 1d8 per level of the spell slot, and you can give the target the {condition:Prone} condition if it is Huge or smaller.

properties.text: Once per turn on a pact weapon hit: expend a Pact Magic spell slot to deal 1d8 Force damage + 1d8 per slot level, and optionally knock the target Prone (Huge or smaller).

name: Eldritch Spear
prerequisite: Warlock level 2+, a Warlock cantrip that deals damage
description:
Choose one of your known Warlock cantrips that deals damage and has a range of 10 feet or more. When you cast that spell, its range increases by a number of feet equal to 30 times your Warlock level.

**Repeatable.** You can gain this invocation more than once. Each time you do so, choose a different eligible cantrip.

properties.text: The chosen Warlock damage cantrip's range increases by 30 × Warlock level feet. Repeatable for different cantrips.

name: Empowered Spell
description:
When you roll damage for a spell, you can spend 1 Sorcery Point to reroll a number of the damage dice up to your Charisma modifier (minimum of one), and you must use the new rolls.

You can use Empowered Spell even if you've already used a different Metamagic option during the casting of the spell.

properties.text: Spend 1 Sorcery Point to reroll up to Charisma modifier damage dice (min 1) and use the new results. Can stack with one other Metamagic option.

name: Enfeebling Arrow
description:
You weave necromantic magic into your arrow. The creature hit by the arrow takes an extra 2d6 necrotic damage. The target must also succeed on a Constitution saving throw, or the damage dealt by its weapon attacks is halved until the start of your next turn.

The necrotic damage increases to 4d6 when you reach 18th level in this class.

properties.text: Expend one Arcane Shot use. On hit, deals extra 2d6 necrotic damage (4d6 at level 18). Target makes a Constitution saving throw or its weapon attack damage is halved until the start of your next turn.

name: Enhanced Arcane Focus
prerequisite: A rod, staff, or wand (requires attunement)
description:
While holding this item, a creature gains a +1 bonus to spell attack rolls. In addition, the creature ignores half cover when making a spell attack.

The bonus increases to +2 when you reach 10th level in this class.

properties.text: Spell attacks ignore half cover. Bonus is +1 (levels 2–9) or +2 (level 10+).

name: Enhanced Defense
prerequisite: A suit of armor or a shield
description:
A creature gains a +1 bonus to Armor Class while wearing (armor) or wielding (shield) the infused item.

The bonus increases to +2 when you reach 10th level in this class.

name: Enhanced Weapon
description:
This magic weapon grants a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it.

The bonus increases to +2 when you reach 10th level in this class.

name: Evasive Footwork
description: As a Bonus Action, you can expend one Superiority Die and take the {action:Disengage} action. You also roll the die and add the number rolled to your AC until the start of your next turn.

properties.text: Bonus Action: expend one Superiority Die, take the Disengage action, and add the die roll to your AC until the start of your next turn.

name: Extended Spell
description:
When you cast a spell that has a duration of 1 minute or longer, you can spend 1 Sorcery Point to double its duration to a maximum duration of 24 hours.

If the affected spell requires {status:Concentration}, you have {rule:Advantage} on any saving throw you make to maintain that Concentration.

properties.text: Spend 1 Sorcery Point to double a spell's duration (min 1 minute, max 24 hours). If the spell requires Concentration, you gain advantage on Concentration saves for it.

name: Far Scribe
prerequisite: Warlock level 5+, Pact of the Tome
description:
A new page appears in your Book of Shadows. With your permission, a creature can use its action to write its name on that page, which can contain a number of names equal to your proficiency bonus.

You can cast the {spell:Sending} spell, targeting a creature whose name is on the page, without using a spell slot and without using material components. To do so, you must write the message on the page. The target hears the message in their mind, and if the target replies, their message appears on the page, rather than in your mind. The writing disappears after 1 minute.

As an action, you can magically erase a name on the page by touching it.

properties.text: Sending cast with this feature targets only creatures whose names are written in your Book of Shadows (capacity = proficiency bonus). No spell slot or material components required. Message is written in the book.

name: Feinting Attack
description: As a Bonus Action, you can expend one Superiority Die to feint, choosing one creature within 5 feet of yourself as your target. You have {rule:Advantage|advantage} on your next attack roll against that target this turn. If that attack hits, add the Superiority Die to the attack's damage roll.

properties.text: Bonus Action: expend one Superiority Die. You have advantage on your next attack roll against a creature within 5 ft this turn. On a hit, add the Superiority Die to the damage roll.

name: Fiendish Vigor
description: You can cast {spell:False Life} on yourself without expending a spell slot. When you cast the spell with this feature, you don't roll the die for the Temporary Hit Points; you automatically get the highest number on the die.

properties.text: When casting False Life with this invocation, the die result is treated as its maximum value (no roll required).

name: Fire Rune
description:
This rune's magic channels the masterful craftsmanship of great smiths. While wearing or carrying an object inscribed with this rune, your proficiency bonus is doubled for any ability check you make that uses your proficiency with a tool.

In addition, when you hit a creature with an attack using a weapon, you can invoke the rune to summon fiery shackles: the target takes an extra 2d6 fire damage, and it must succeed on a Strength saving throw or be {condition:Restrained} for 1 minute. While restrained by the shackles, the target takes 2d6 fire damage at the start of each of its turns. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, banishing the shackles on a success. Once you invoke this rune, you can't do so again until you finish a short or long rest.

properties.text: Doubles proficiency bonus for tool-based ability checks. When you hit with a weapon, invoke (recharge short or long rest) to deal 2d6 extra fire damage and force a Strength saving throw or Restrain the target for 1 minute (2d6 fire per turn; repeats save at end of each turn).

name: Frost Rune
description:
This rune's magic evokes the might of those who survive in the wintry wilderness, such as frost giants. While wearing or carrying an object inscribed with this rune, you have {rule:Advantage|advantage} on Wisdom (Animal Handling) checks and Charisma (Intimidation) checks.

In addition, you can invoke the rune as a bonus action to increase your sturdiness. For 10 minutes, you gain a +2 bonus to all ability checks and saving throws that use Strength or Constitution. Once you invoke this rune, you can't do so again until you finish a short or long rest.

properties.text: Bonus Action (recharge short or long rest): for 10 minutes, gain +2 to all Strength and Constitution ability checks and saving throws.

name: Gaze of Two Minds
description:
You can use a Bonus Action to touch a willing creature and perceive through its senses until the end of your next turn. As long as the creature is on the same plane of existence as you, you can take a Bonus Action on subsequent turns to maintain this connection, extending the duration until the end of your next turn. The connection ends if you don't maintain it in this way.

While perceiving through the other creature's senses, you benefit from any special senses possessed by that creature, and you can cast spells as if you were in your space or the other creature's space if the two of you are within 60 feet of each other.

properties.text: Bonus Action: touch a willing creature to perceive through its senses. Renew each turn with another Bonus Action. Cast spells from your space or the creature's space (within 60 ft). Benefit from the creature's special senses.

name: Ghostly Gaze
description:
As an action, you gain the ability to see through solid objects to a range of 30 feet. Within that range, you have darkvision if you don't already have it. This special sight lasts for 1 minute or until your {status:Concentration} ends (as if you were concentrating on a spell). During that time, you perceive objects as ghostly, transparent images.

Once you use this invocation, you can't use it again until you finish a short or long rest.

properties.text: As an action: see through solid objects within 30 ft (gaining darkvision if needed) for 1 minute or until Concentration ends. Objects appear ghostly and transparent.

name: Gift of the Depths
description:
You can breathe underwater, and you gain a Swim Speed equal to your Speed.

You can also cast {spell:Water Breathing} once without expending a spell slot. You regain the ability to cast it in this way again when you finish a Long Rest.

properties.text: You can breathe underwater and gain a Swim Speed equal to your Speed.

name: Gift of the Ever-Living Ones
description: Whenever you regain hit points while your familiar is within 100 feet of you, treat any dice rolled to determine the hit points you regain as having rolled their maximum value for you.

properties.text: While your familiar is within 100 feet, any hit dice you roll to regain HP are treated as their maximum value.

name: Gift of the Protectors
prerequisite: Warlock level 9+, Pact of the Tome
description:
A new page appears in your Book of Shadows when you conjure it. With your permission, a creature can take an action to write its name on that page, which can contain a number of names equal to your Charisma modifier (minimum of one name).

When any creature whose name is on the page is reduced to 0 Hit Points but not killed outright, the creature magically drops to 1 Hit Point instead. Once this magic is triggered, no creature can benefit from it until you finish a Long Rest.

As a Magic action, you can erase a name on the page by touching it.

properties.text: Named creatures (capacity = Charisma modifier, min 1) drop to 1 HP instead of 0 once per long rest. Triggered use resets all creatures' protection.

name: Goading Attack
description: When you hit a creature with an attack roll, you can expend one Superiority Die to attempt to goad the target into attacking you. Add the Superiority Die to the attack's damage roll. The target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or have {rule:Disadvantage|disadvantage} on attack rolls against targets other than you until the end of your next turn.

properties.text: On hit: expend one Superiority Die, add it to damage. The target makes a Wisdom saving throw or has disadvantage on attack rolls against targets other than you until the end of your next turn.

name: Grappling Strike
description: Immediately after you hit a creature with a melee attack on your turn, you can expend one Superiority Die and then try to grapple the target as a bonus action. Add the Superiority Die to your Strength (Athletics) check.

properties.text: After hitting with a melee attack on your turn: expend one Superiority Die to attempt to grapple the target as a bonus action, adding the Superiority Die to your Strength (Athletics) check.

name: Grasp of Hadar
description: Once on each of your turns when you hit a creature with your {spell:Eldritch Blast}, you can move that creature in a straight line 10 feet closer to you.

properties.text: Once per turn on an Eldritch Blast hit: pull the target up to 10 feet straight toward you.

name: Grasping Arrow
description:
When this arrow strikes its target, conjuration magic creates grasping, poisonous brambles, which wrap around the target. The creature hit by the arrow takes an extra 2d6 poison damage, its speed is reduced by 10 feet, and it takes 2d6 slashing damage the first time on each turn it moves 1 foot or more without teleporting. The target or any creature that can reach it can use its action to remove the brambles with a successful Strength (Athletics) check against your Arcane Shot save DC. Otherwise, the brambles last for 1 minute or until you use this option again.

The poison damage and slashing damage both increase to 4d6 when you reach 18th level in this class.

properties.text: Expend one Arcane Shot use. On hit, deals extra 2d6 poison damage and 2d6 slashing damage the first time each turn the target moves 1+ ft without teleporting; target speed reduced by 10 ft. Brambles last 1 minute or until you use this option again; removed by a Strength (Athletics) check vs. your Arcane Shot save DC. Both damage types increase to 4d6 at level 18.

name: Heightened Spell
description: When you cast a spell that forces a creature to make a saving throw, you can spend 2 Sorcery Points to give one target of the spell {rule:Disadvantage} on saves against the spell.

properties.text: Spend 2 Sorcery Points to impose disadvantage on one target's saving throw against the spell.

name: Helm of Awareness
description: While wearing this helmet, a creature has {rule:Advantage|advantage} on initiative rolls. In addition, the wearer can't be surprised, provided it isn't {condition:Incapacitated}.

properties.text: The wearer can't be surprised as long as they aren't Incapacitated.

name: Hill Rune
description:
This rune's magic bestows a resilience reminiscent of a hill giant. While wearing or carrying an object that bears this rune, you have {rule:Advantage|advantage} on saving throws against being {condition:Poisoned}, and you have {rule:Resistance|resistance} against poison damage.

In addition, you can invoke the rune as a bonus action, gaining resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage for 1 minute. Once you invoke this rune, you can't do so again until you finish a short or long rest.

properties.text: Bonus Action (recharge short or long rest): gain resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage for 1 minute.

name: Homunculus Servant
prerequisite: A gem or crystal worth at least 100 gp
description:
You learn intricate methods for magically creating a special homunculus that serves you. The item you infuse serves as the creature's heart, around which the creature's body instantly forms.

The homunculus is friendly to you and your companions, and it obeys your commands. In combat, the homunculus shares your initiative count, but it takes its turn immediately after yours. It can move and use its reaction on its own, but the only action it takes on its turn is the {action:Dodge} action, unless you take a bonus action on your turn to command it to take another action. If you are {condition:Incapacitated}, the homunculus can take any action of its choice, not just Dodge.

The homunculus regains 2d6 hit points if the {spell:Mending} spell is cast on it. If you or the homunculus dies, it vanishes, leaving its heart in its space.

properties.text: Creates a Homunculus Servant bound to the infused gem/crystal. Acts on your initiative (immediately after you). Default action: Dodge. Bonus Action: command it to take another action. Healed by Mending (2d6). Vanishes if you or it dies.

name: Improved Pact Weapon
description:
You can use any weapon you summon with your Pact of the Blade feature as a spellcasting focus for your warlock spells.

In addition, the weapon gains a +1 bonus to its attack and damage rolls, unless it is a magic weapon that already has a bonus to those rolls.

Finally, the weapon you conjure can be a shortbow, longbow, light crossbow, or heavy crossbow.

properties.text: Your pact weapon can be used as a spellcasting focus. It gains a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls unless it already has a magic bonus. You can conjure shortbows, longbows, light crossbows, or heavy crossbows as pact weapons.

name: Interception
description: When a creature you can see hits a target, other than you, within 5 feet of you with an attack, you can use your reaction to reduce the damage the target takes by 1d10 + your proficiency bonus (to a minimum of 0 damage). You must be wielding a shield or a simple or martial weapon to use this reaction.

properties.text: Reaction: when a creature you can see hits an ally within 5 ft of you, reduce the damage by 1d10 + proficiency bonus (minimum 0). Requires wielding a shield or simple/martial weapon.

name: Investment of the Chain Master
prerequisite: Warlock level 5+, Pact of the Chain
description:
When you cast {spell:Find Familiar}, you infuse the summoned familiar with a measure of your eldritch power, granting the creature the following benefits.

**Aerial or Aquatic.** The familiar gains either a Fly Speed or a Swim Speed (your choice) of 40 feet.

**Quick Attack.** As a Bonus Action, you can command the familiar to take the {action:Attack} action.

**Necrotic or Radiant Damage.** Whenever the familiar deals Bludgeoning, Piercing, or Slashing damage, you can make it deal Necrotic or Radiant damage instead.

**Your Save DC.** If the familiar forces a creature to make a saving throw, it uses your spell save DC.

**Resistance.** When the familiar takes damage, you can take a Reaction to grant it Resistance against that damage.

properties.text: Your Find Familiar familiar gains: 40 ft fly or swim speed (your choice), you can command it to Attack as a bonus action, it can deal Necrotic or Radiant instead of B/P/S damage, it uses your spell save DC, and you can use a Reaction to grant it resistance to damage it takes.

name: Lance of Lethargy
description: Once on each of your turns when you hit a creature with your {spell:Eldritch Blast}, you can reduce that creature's speed by 10 feet until the end of your next turn.

properties.text: Once per turn on an Eldritch Blast hit: reduce the target's speed by 10 feet until the end of your next turn.

name: Lessons of the First Ones
description:
You have received knowledge from an elder entity of the multiverse, allowing you to gain one Origin feat of your choice.

**Repeatable.** You can gain this invocation more than once. Each time you do so, choose a different Origin feat.

name: Lifedrinker
prerequisite: Warlock level 9+, Pact of the Blade
description: Once per turn when you hit a creature with your pact weapon, you can deal an extra 1d6 Necrotic, Psychic, or Radiant damage (your choice) to the creature, and you can expend one of your Hit Point Dice to roll it and regain a number of Hit Points equal to the roll plus your Constitution modifier (minimum of 1 Hit Point).

properties.text: Once per turn on a pact weapon hit: deal extra 1d6 Necrotic, Psychic, or Radiant damage (your choice). Optionally expend one Hit Die to regain HP equal to the roll + Constitution modifier (min 1).

name: Lunging Attack
description: As a Bonus Action, you can expend one Superiority Die and take the {action:Dash} action. If you move at least 5 feet in a straight line immediately before hitting with a melee attack as part of the {action:Attack} action on this turn, you can add the Superiority Die to the attack's damage roll.

properties.text: Bonus Action: expend one Superiority Die and take the Dash action. If you move 5+ ft in a straight line immediately before hitting with a melee attack on this turn, add the Superiority Die to the damage roll.

name: Maddening Hex
prerequisite: Warlock level 5+, Hex spell or a warlock curse feature
description: As a bonus action, you cause a psychic disturbance around the target cursed by your {spell:Hex} spell or by a warlock feature of yours, such as Hexblade's Curse or Sign of Ill Omen. When you do so, you deal psychic damage to the cursed target and each creature of your choice that you can see within 5 feet of it. The psychic damage equals your Charisma modifier (minimum of 1 damage). To use this invocation, you must be able to see the cursed target, and it must be within 30 feet of you.

properties.text: Bonus Action: deal Charisma modifier psychic damage (min 1) to your Hex/curse target and any creatures of your choice within 5 ft of it. Target must be visible and within 30 ft.

name: Maneuvering Attack
description: When you hit a creature with an attack roll, you can expend one Superiority Die to maneuver one of your comrades into another position. Add the Superiority Die roll to the attack's damage roll, and choose a willing creature who can see or hear you. That creature can use its Reaction to move up to half its Speed without provoking an {action:Opportunity Attack|Opportunity Attack} from the target of your attack.

properties.text: On hit: expend one Superiority Die, add it to damage. A willing ally who can see or hear you can use their Reaction to move up to half their Speed without provoking an opportunity attack from the target.

name: Mask of Many Faces
description: You can cast {spell:Disguise Self} without expending a spell slot.

name: Master of Myriad Forms
description: You can cast {spell:Alter Self} without expending a spell slot.

name: Menacing Attack
description: When you hit a creature with an attack roll, you can expend one Superiority Die to attempt to frighten the target. Add the Superiority Die to the attack's damage roll. The target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or have the {condition:Frightened} condition until the end of your next turn.

properties.text: On hit: expend one Superiority Die, add it to damage. The target makes a Wisdom saving throw or gains the Frightened condition until the end of your next turn.

name: Mind Sharpener
prerequisite: A suit of armor or robes
description: The infused item can send a jolt to the wearer to refocus their mind. The item has 4 charges. When the wearer fails a Constitution saving throw to maintain {status:Concentration}, the wearer can use its reaction to expend 1 of the item's charges to succeed instead. The item regains 1d4 expended charges daily at dawn.

properties.text: 4 charges (regain 1d4 at dawn). Reaction: when the wearer fails a Constitution saving throw to maintain Concentration, expend 1 charge to succeed instead.

name: Misty Visions
description: You can cast {spell:Silent Image} without expending a spell slot.

name: One with Shadows
description: While you're in an area of dim light or darkness, you can cast {spell:Invisibility} on yourself without expending a spell slot.

properties.text: Invisibility via this invocation can only be cast while in dim light or darkness.

name: Otherworldly Leap
description: You can cast {spell:Jump} on yourself without expending a spell slot.

name: Pact of the Blade
description:
As a Bonus Action, you can conjure a pact weapon in your hand—a Simple or Martial Melee weapon of your choice with which you bond—or create a bond with a magic weapon you touch; you can't bond with a magic weapon if someone else is attuned to it or another Warlock is bonded with it. Until the bond ends, you have proficiency with the weapon, and you can use it as a Spellcasting Focus.

Whenever you attack with the bonded weapon, you can use your Charisma modifier for the attack and damage rolls instead of using Strength or Dexterity; and you can cause the weapon to deal Necrotic, Psychic, or Radiant damage or its normal damage type.

Your bond with the weapon ends if you use this feature's Bonus Action again, if the weapon is more than 5 feet away from you for 1 minute or more, or if you die. A conjured weapon disappears when the bond ends.

properties.text: Bonus Action: conjure or bond with a melee weapon. Use Charisma for attack and damage rolls. Deal Necrotic, Psychic, or Radiant instead of normal damage. Weapon is a Spellcasting Focus. Bond ends if dismissed, weapon is 5+ ft away for 1 minute, or you die.

name: Pact of the Chain
description:
You learn the {spell:Find Familiar} spell and can cast it as a Magic action without expending a spell slot.

When you cast the spell, you choose one of the normal forms for your familiar or one of the following special forms: Imp, Pseudodragon, Quasit, Skeleton, Slaad Tadpole, Sphinx of Wonder, Sprite, or Venomous Snake.

Additionally, when you take the {action:Attack} action, you can forgo one of your own attacks to allow your familiar to make one attack of its own with its Reaction.

properties.text: Find Familiar can be cast as a Magic action without a spell slot. Familiar options include special forms: Imp, Pseudodragon, Quasit, Skeleton, Slaad Tadpole, Sphinx of Wonder, Sprite, or Venomous Snake. When you take the Attack action, you can forgo one attack to let your familiar attack as a Reaction.

name: Pact of the Talisman
description:
Your patron gives you an amulet, a talisman that can aid the wearer when the need is great. When the wearer fails an ability check, they can add a d4 to the roll, potentially turning the roll into a success. This benefit can be used a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus, and all expended uses are restored when you finish a long rest.

If you lose the talisman, you can perform a 1-hour ceremony to receive a replacement from your patron. This ceremony can be performed during a short or long rest, and it destroys the previous amulet. The talisman turns to ash when you die.

properties.text: The talisman's wearer can add 1d4 to a failed ability check, expending one use. The talisman can be replaced with a 1-hour ceremony during a rest. Turns to ash on death.

name: Pact of the Tome
description:
Stitching together strands of shadow, you conjure forth a Book of Shadows at the end of a Short or Long Rest. The book disappears if you conjure another book with this feature or if you die.

**Cantrips and Rituals.** When the book appears, choose three cantrips, and choose two level 1 spells that have the Ritual tag. The spells can be from any class's spell list, and they must be spells you don't already have prepared. While the book is on your person, you have the chosen spells prepared, and they function as Warlock spells for you.

**Spellcasting Focus.** You can use the book as a Spellcasting Focus.

properties.text: Conjure a Book of Shadows at the end of each rest. It grants 3 cantrips (any class) and 2 level 1 ritual spells (any class) as always-prepared Warlock spells. The book is a Spellcasting Focus. Book vanishes if replaced or at death.

name: Parry
description: When another creature damages you with a melee attack roll, you can take a Reaction and expend one Superiority Die to reduce the damage by the number you roll on your Superiority Die plus your Strength or Dexterity modifier (your choice).

properties.text: Reaction: when hit by a melee attack, expend one Superiority Die to reduce the damage by the Superiority Die roll + your Strength or Dexterity modifier (your choice).

name: Piercing Arrow
description:
You use transmutation magic to give your arrow an ethereal quality. When you use this option, you don't make an attack roll for the attack. Instead, the arrow shoots forward in a line, which is 1 foot wide and 30 feet long, before disappearing. The arrow passes harmlessly through objects, ignoring cover. Each creature in that line must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes damage as if it were hit by the arrow, plus an extra 1d6 piercing damage. On a successful save, a target takes half as much damage.

The piercing damage increases to 2d6 when you reach 18th level in this class.

properties.text: Expend one Arcane Shot use. No attack roll; instead a 1-ft wide, 30-ft long line ignoring cover. All creatures in the line make a Dexterity saving throw: fail = arrow damage + 1d6 piercing (2d6 at level 18), success = half damage.

name: Precision Attack
description: When you miss with an attack roll, you can expend one Superiority Die, roll that die, and add it to the attack roll, potentially causing the attack to hit.

properties.text: On a missed attack roll: expend one Superiority Die and add it to the roll, potentially converting the miss to a hit.

name: Protection of the Talisman
prerequisite: Warlock level 7+, Pact of the Talisman
description: When the wearer of your talisman fails a saving throw, they can add a d4 to the roll, potentially turning the save into a success. This benefit can be used a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus, and all expended uses are restored when you finish a long rest.

properties.text: The talisman wearer can add 1d4 to a failed saving throw (prof bonus uses, restored on long rest), potentially converting the failure into a success.

name: Pushing Attack
description: When you hit a creature with an attack roll using a weapon or an Unarmed Strike, you can expend one Superiority Die to attempt to drive the target back. Add the Superiority Die to the attack's damage roll. If the target is Large or smaller, it must succeed on a Strength saving throw or be pushed up to 15 feet directly away from you.

properties.text: On hit with a weapon or Unarmed Strike: expend one Superiority Die, add it to damage. If target is Large or smaller, it makes a Strength saving throw or is pushed up to 15 ft directly away from you.

name: Quick Toss
description: As a bonus action, you can expend one Superiority Die and make a ranged attack with a weapon that has the thrown property. You can draw the weapon as part of making this attack. If you hit, add the Superiority Die to the weapon's damage roll.

properties.text: Bonus Action: expend one Superiority Die to make a ranged attack with a thrown weapon (can draw as part of the attack). On a hit, add the Superiority Die to the damage roll.

name: Quickened Spell
description: When you cast a spell that has a casting time of an action, you can spend 2 Sorcery Points to change the casting time to a Bonus Action for this casting. You can't modify a spell in this way if you've already cast a level 1+ spell on the current turn, nor can you cast a level 1+ spell on this turn after modifying a spell in this way.

properties.text: Spend 2 Sorcery Points to change a 1-action spell's casting time to a Bonus Action. Can't be used if you've already cast a level 1+ spell this turn, and you can't cast a level 1+ spell on the same turn afterward.

name: Radiant Weapon
prerequisite: Artificer level 6, a simple or martial weapon (requires attunement)
description:
This magic weapon grants a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it. While holding it, the wielder can take a bonus action to cause it to shed bright light in a 30-foot radius and dim light for an additional 30 feet. The wielder can extinguish the light as a bonus action.

The weapon has 4 charges. As a reaction immediately after being hit by an attack, the wielder can expend 1 charge and cause the attacker to be {condition:Blinded} until the end of the attacker's next turn, unless the attacker succeeds on a Constitution saving throw against your spell save DC. The weapon regains 1d4 expended charges daily at dawn.

properties.text: Bonus Action: shed bright light (30 ft) and dim light (another 30 ft), or extinguish. 4 charges (regain 1d4 at dawn). Reaction immediately after being hit: expend 1 charge, attacker makes a Constitution saving throw vs. spell save DC or is Blinded until the end of their next turn.

name: Rally
description: As a Bonus Action, you can expend one Superiority Die to bolster the resolve of a companion. Choose an ally of yours within 30 feet of yourself who can see or hear you. That creature gains Temporary Hit Points equal to the Superiority Die roll plus half your Fighter level (round down).

properties.text: Bonus Action: expend one Superiority Die. A chosen ally within 30 ft who can see or hear you gains temporary hit points equal to the Superiority Die roll + half your Fighter level (rounded down).

name: Rebuke of the Talisman
description: When the wearer of your talisman is hit by an attacker you can see within 30 feet of you, you can use your reaction to deal psychic damage to the attacker equal to your proficiency bonus and push it up to 10 feet away from the talisman's wearer.

properties.text: Reaction when your talisman's wearer is hit: deal psychic damage equal to your proficiency bonus to the attacker and push it up to 10 ft from the wearer. Attacker must be visible and within 30 ft.

name: Relentless Hex
prerequisite: Warlock level 7+, Hex spell or a warlock curse feature
description: Your curse creates a temporary bond between you and your target. As a bonus action, you can magically teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space you can see within 5 feet of the target cursed by your {spell:Hex} spell or by a warlock feature of yours, such as Hexblade's Curse or Sign of Ill Omen. To teleport in this way, you must be able to see the cursed target.

properties.text: Bonus Action: teleport up to 30 ft to an unoccupied space within 5 ft of your Hex/curse target. The target must be visible.

name: Repeating Shot
prerequisite: A simple or martial weapon with the ammunition property (requires attunement)
description:
This magic weapon grants a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it when it's used to make a ranged attack, and it ignores the loading property if it has it.

If the weapon lacks ammunition, it produces its own, automatically creating one piece of magic ammunition when the wielder makes a ranged attack with it. The ammunition created by the weapon vanishes the instant after it hits or misses a target.

properties.text: Ignores the loading property. If the weapon has no ammunition, it generates one piece of magic ammunition per ranged attack (vanishes after hitting or missing).

name: Repelling Blast
prerequisite: Warlock level 2+, a Warlock cantrip that deals damage via an attack roll
description:
Choose one of your known Warlock cantrips that requires an attack roll. When you hit a Large or smaller creature with that cantrip, you can push the creature up to 10 feet straight away from you.

**Repeatable.** You can gain this invocation more than once. Each time you do so, choose a different eligible cantrip.

properties.text: On a hit with the chosen Warlock attack-roll cantrip: push the target (Large or smaller) up to 10 ft straight away. Repeatable for different cantrips.

name: Replicate Magic Item
description:
Using this infusion, you replicate a particular magic item. You can learn this infusion multiple times; each time you do so, choose a magic item that you can make with it. Available items scale with your Artificer level:

**2nd-level Artificer:** Alchemy Jug, Bag of Holding, Cap of Water Breathing, Goggles of Night, Rope of Climbing, Sending Stones, Wand of Magic Detection, Wand of Secrets.

**6th-level Artificer:** Boots of Elvenkind, Cloak of Elvenkind (attunement), Cloak of the Manta Ray, Eyes of Charming (attunement), Gloves of Thievery, Lantern of Revealing, Pipes of Haunting, Ring of Water Walking.

**10th-level Artificer:** Boots of Striding and Springing (attunement), Boots of the Winterlands (attunement), Bracers of Archery (attunement), Brooch of Shielding (attunement), Cloak of Protection (attunement), Eyes of the Eagle (attunement), Gauntlets of Ogre Power (attunement), Gloves of Missile Snaring (attunement), Gloves of Swimming and Climbing (attunement), Hat of Disguise (attunement), Headband of Intellect (attunement), Helm of Telepathy (attunement), Medallion of Thoughts (attunement), Necklace of Adaptation (attunement), Periapt of Wound Closure (attunement), Pipes of the Sewers (attunement), Quiver of Ehlonna, Ring of Jumping (attunement), Ring of Mind Shielding (attunement), Slippers of Spider Climbing (attunement), Winged Boots (attunement).

**14th-level Artificer:** Amulet of Health (attunement), Belt of Hill Giant Strength (attunement), Boots of Levitation (attunement), Boots of Speed (attunement), Bracers of Defense (attunement), Cloak of the Bat (attunement), Dimensional Shackles, Gem of Seeing (attunement), Horn of Blasting, Ring of Free Action (attunement), Ring of Protection (attunement), Ring of the Ram (attunement).

properties.text: Repeatable infusion. Each time it is taken, choose a different magic item from the level-appropriate list to replicate.

name: Repulsion Shield
description:
A creature gains a +1 bonus to Armor Class while wielding this shield.

The shield has 4 charges. While holding it, the wielder can use a reaction immediately after being hit by a melee attack to expend 1 of the shield's charges and push the attacker up to 15 feet away. The shield regains 1d4 expended charges daily at dawn.

properties.text: 4 charges (regain 1d4 at dawn). Reaction immediately after being hit by a melee attack: expend 1 charge to push the attacker up to 15 ft away.

name: Resistant Armor
prerequisite: Artificer level 6, a suit of armor (requires attunement)
description: While wearing this armor, a creature has resistance to one of the following damage types, which you choose when you infuse the item: acid, cold, fire, force, lightning, necrotic, poison, psychic, radiant, or thunder.

properties.text: Choose one damage type when infusing (acid, cold, fire, force, lightning, necrotic, poison, psychic, radiant, or thunder). The wearer has resistance to that damage type.

name: Returning Weapon
prerequisite: A simple or martial weapon with the thrown property
description: This magic weapon grants a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it, and it returns to the wielder's hand immediately after it is used to make a ranged attack.

properties.text: Returns to the wielder's hand immediately after being used to make a ranged attack.

name: Riposte
description: When a creature misses you with a melee attack roll, you can take a Reaction and expend one Superiority Die to make a melee attack roll with a weapon or an Unarmed Strike against the creature. If you hit, add the Superiority Die to the attack's damage.

properties.text: Reaction: when a creature misses you with a melee attack, expend one Superiority Die to make a melee attack (weapon or Unarmed Strike) against it. On a hit, add the Superiority Die to the damage roll.

name: Seeking Arrow
description:
Using divination magic, you grant your arrow the ability to seek out a target. When you use this option, you don't make an attack roll for the attack. Instead, choose one creature you have seen in the past minute. The arrow flies toward that creature, moving around corners if necessary and ignoring three-quarters cover and half cover. If the target is within the weapon's range and there is a path large enough for the arrow to travel to the target, the target must make a Dexterity saving throw. Otherwise, the arrow disappears after traveling as far as it can. On a failed save, the target takes damage as if it were hit by the arrow, plus an extra 1d6 force damage, and you learn the target's current location. On a successful save, the target takes half as much damage, and you don't learn its location.

The force damage increases to 2d6 when you reach 18th level in this class.

properties.text: Expend one Arcane Shot use. No attack roll; choose a creature seen in the past minute. Arrow ignores half and three-quarters cover and moves around corners. Target makes a Dexterity saving throw: fail = arrow damage + 1d6 force (2d6 at level 18) and you learn its location; success = half damage, location unknown.

name: Seeking Spell
description:
If you make an attack roll for a spell and miss, you can spend 1 Sorcery Point to reroll the d20, and you must use the new roll.

You can use Seeking Spell even if you've already used a different Metamagic option during the casting of the spell.

properties.text: Spend 1 Sorcery Point after missing a spell attack roll to reroll the d20 (must use new result). Can stack with one other Metamagic option.

name: Shadow Arrow
description:
You weave illusion magic into your arrow, causing it to occlude your foe's vision with shadows. The creature hit by the arrow takes an extra 2d6 psychic damage, and it must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or be unable to see anything farther than 5 feet away until the start of your next turn.

The psychic damage increases to 4d6 when you reach 18th level in this class.

properties.text: Expend one Arcane Shot use. On hit, deals extra 2d6 psychic damage (4d6 at level 18). Target makes a Wisdom saving throw or can't see anything farther than 5 ft away until the start of your next turn.

name: Shroud of Shadow
description: You can cast {spell:Invisibility} at will, without expending a spell slot.

name: Spell-Refueling Ring
description: While wearing this ring, the creature can recover one expended spell slot as an action. The recovered slot can be of 3rd level or lower. Once used, the ring can't be used again until the next dawn.

properties.text: Action: recover one expended spell slot of 3rd level or lower (once per dawn).

name: Stone Rune
description:
This rune's magic channels the judiciousness associated with stone giants. While wearing or carrying an object inscribed with this rune, you have {rule:Advantage|advantage} on Wisdom (Insight) checks, and you have {rule:Darkvision|darkvision} out to a range of 120 feet.

In addition, when a creature you can see ends its turn within 30 feet of you, you can use your reaction to invoke the rune and force the creature to make a Wisdom saving throw. Unless the save succeeds, the creature is {condition:Charmed} by you for 1 minute. While charmed in this way, the creature has a speed of 0 and is {condition:Incapacitated}, descending into a dreamy stupor. The creature repeats the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on a success. Once you invoke this rune, you can't do so again until you finish a short or long rest.

properties.text: Reaction (recharge short or long rest): when a creature within 30 ft ends its turn, force a Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, the creature is Charmed (speed 0, Incapacitated) for 1 minute. Repeats save at end of each turn.

name: Storm Rune
description:
Using this rune, you can glimpse the future like a storm giant seer. While wearing or carrying an object inscribed with this rune, you have {rule:Advantage|advantage} on Intelligence (Arcana) checks, and you can't be surprised as long as you aren't {condition:Incapacitated}.

In addition, you can invoke the rune as a bonus action to enter a prophetic state for 1 minute or until you're {condition:Incapacitated}. Until the state ends, when you or another creature you can see within 60 feet of you makes an attack roll, a saving throw, or an ability check, you can use your reaction to cause the roll to have advantage or disadvantage. Once you invoke this rune, you can't do so again until you finish a short or long rest.

properties.text: Can't be surprised while not Incapacitated. Bonus Action (recharge short or long rest): enter a prophetic state for 1 minute. While active, Reaction: cause any attack roll, saving throw, or ability check by you or a creature within 60 ft to have advantage or disadvantage.

name: Subtle Spell
description: When you cast a spell, you can spend 1 Sorcery Point to cast it without any Verbal, Somatic, or Material components, except Material components that are consumed by the spell or that have a cost specified in the spell.

properties.text: Spend 1 Sorcery Point to cast a spell without Verbal, Somatic, or Material components (except consumed or costly material components).

name: Superior Technique
description:
You learn one maneuver of your choice from among those available to the Battle Master archetype. If a maneuver you use requires your target to make a saving throw to resist the maneuver's effects, the saving throw DC equals 8 + your proficiency bonus + your Strength or Dexterity modifier (your choice).

You gain one superiority die, which is a d6 (this die is added to any superiority dice you have from another source). This die is used to fuel your maneuvers. A superiority die is expended when you use it. You regain your expended superiority dice when you finish a short or long rest.

properties.text: Grants 1 Battle Master maneuver of your choice (from MV:B list). Maneuver save DC = 8 + proficiency bonus + Strength or Dexterity modifier. Superiority die is a d6; stacks with other sources.

name: Sweeping Attack
description: When you hit a creature with a melee attack roll using a weapon or an Unarmed Strike, you can expend one Superiority Die to attempt to damage another creature. Choose another creature within 5 feet of the original target and within your reach. If the original attack roll would hit the second creature, it takes damage equal to the number you roll on your Superiority Die. The damage is of the same type dealt by the original attack.

properties.text: On hit with a melee weapon or Unarmed Strike: expend one Superiority Die. Choose a second creature within 5 ft of the target and your reach. If the original attack roll would also hit that creature, it takes damage equal to the Superiority Die roll (same damage type).

name: Tactical Assessment
description: When you make an Intelligence (History or Investigation) check or a Wisdom (Insight) check, you can expend one Superiority Die and add that die to the ability check.

properties.text: Expend one Superiority Die to add it to an Intelligence (History), Intelligence (Investigation), or Wisdom (Insight) check.

name: Thirsting Blade
prerequisite: Warlock level 5+, Pact of the Blade
description: You gain the Extra Attack feature for your pact weapon only. With that feature, you can attack twice with the weapon instead of once when you take the {action:Attack} action on your turn.

properties.text: Extra Attack applies to your pact weapon: attack twice instead of once when you take the Attack action.

name: Thrown Weapon Fighting
description:
You can draw a weapon that has the thrown property as part of the attack you make with the weapon.

In addition, when you hit with a ranged attack using a thrown weapon, you gain a +2 bonus to the damage roll.

modifiers.condition: when hitting with a thrown weapon

properties.text: You can draw a thrown weapon as part of the attack made with it.

name: Tomb of Levistus
description:
As a reaction when you take damage, you can entomb yourself in ice, which melts away at the end of your next turn. You gain 10 temporary hit points per warlock level, which take as much of the triggering damage as possible. Immediately after you take the damage, you gain vulnerability to fire damage, your speed is reduced to 0, and you are {condition:Incapacitated}. These effects, including any remaining temporary hit points, all end when the ice melts.

Once you use this invocation, you can't use it again until you finish a short or long rest.

properties.text: Reaction when taking damage: gain 10 temp HP per Warlock level (absorb triggering damage first), then gain vulnerability to fire, speed 0, and Incapacitated until the end of your next turn.

name: Transmuted Spell
description: When you cast a spell that deals a type of damage from the following list, you can spend 1 Sorcery Point to change that damage type to one of the other listed types: Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, Poison, Thunder.

properties.text: Spend 1 Sorcery Point to swap a spell's damage type among: Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, Poison, Thunder.

name: Trickster's Escape
description: You can cast {spell:Freedom of Movement} once on yourself without expending a spell slot. You regain the ability to do so when you finish a long rest.

name: Trip Attack
description: When you hit a creature with an attack roll using a weapon or an Unarmed Strike, you can expend one Superiority Die and add the die to the attack's damage roll. If the target is Large or smaller, it must succeed on a Strength saving throw or have the {condition:Prone} condition.

properties.text: On hit with a weapon or Unarmed Strike: expend one Superiority Die, add it to damage. If target is Large or smaller, it makes a Strength saving throw or gains the Prone condition.

name: Twinned Spell
description: When you cast a spell, such as {spell:Charm Person}, that can be cast with a higher-level spell slot to target an additional creature, you can spend 1 Sorcery Point to increase the spell's effective level by 1.

properties.text: Spend 1 Sorcery Point to increase the effective spell slot level by 1, allowing spells that scale by targeting an additional creature to affect one more target.

name: Unarmed Fighting
description:
Your unarmed strikes can deal bludgeoning damage equal to 1d6 + your Strength modifier on a hit. If you aren't wielding any weapons or a shield when you make the attack roll, the d6 becomes a d8.

At the start of each of your turns, you can deal 1d4 bludgeoning damage to one creature {condition:Grappled} by you.

properties.text: Unarmed strikes deal 1d6 + Strength modifier bludgeoning damage (d8 if holding no weapon or shield). At the start of each of your turns, you may deal 1d4 bludgeoning damage to one creature you have Grappled.

name: Undying Servitude
description: You can cast {spell:Animate Dead} without using a spell slot. Once you do so, you can't cast it in this way again until you finish a long rest.

name: Visions of Distant Realms
description: You can cast {spell:Arcane Eye} without expending a spell slot.

name: Whispers of the Grave
description: You can cast {spell:Speak with Dead} without expending a spell slot.

name: Witch Sight
description: You have {rule:Truesight} with a range of 30 feet.
